---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a functional idea or module expansion for the SassyDoc platform.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, sprint-backlog
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Proposal
A clear and concise description of what the functional feature enhancement is.

## Problem Solved
Does this feature target the Technical Blueprinting layer (for Developers) or the Functional Onboarding Manual layer (for Users)? Explain the use case friction.

## Proposed Implementation Layout
Describe your vision of the architectural expansion. Which components (`frontend/src/components`, `backend/app/routers`) will this change modify?

## Superlative UI Impact
Describe how this enhancement adapts to the mobile-first layout specifications and what tactile micro-interactions (`active:scale-95`) it should implement.

## Alternative Contexts
A clear description of any alternative solutions or mock engine bypass routes you have evaluated.
